## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm e2e` when user flows changed
- [ ] `pnpm build`

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and documented where needed.
- [ ] API behavior has tests when route behavior changed.
- [ ] Database schema changes include migrations.
- [ ] No `.env` files, database files, traces, or build artifacts are committed.
